title: Home Building Shows Signs of Stabilization with Monthly Gain in Starts
content: Overall housing starts increased 10.8% in March to a seasonally adjusted annual rate of 1.5 million units, according to a report from the U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development and the U.S. Census Bureau.

title: Housing starts overachieved in March amid warning signs aplenty
content: March starts reached 1.5 million, single-family 1.03 million, while permits fell 10.8% and completions dropped 13.5% year over year.

title: CoStar Group, Homes.com surge in Q1 — CEO welcomes end of activist ‘distraction’
content: Homes.com revenue grew 58% to $26 million in the first quarter, with agent subscribers surging 205% to 35,175.

title: US hotel construction pipeline down roughly 5% YOY in Q1 2026
content: Despite the decline, the luxury segment reached a record 102 projects in the quarter, up 16% year over year, per a Lodging Econometrics report.
